meaning: adj.金属丝的,金属线制的,铁丝似的,瘦长结实的,(嗓音)尖细的
examples: His body is wiry and athletic.
My horse is small but wiry and sure-footed.
Her wiry hair was pushed up on top of her head in an untidy bun.
Wiry, sociable, in his early thirties, he worked as an ecology officer for the municipality.
In his wiry hair that was the color of ditchwater a small pumpkin seed shone.
